name: Panel
description: Panel is a container with the optional content toggle feature.

props.name: toggleable
props.description: Defines if content of panel can be expanded and collapsed.

props.name: collapsed
props.description: Defines the initial state of panel content.

props.name: toggleButtonProps
props.description: Used to pass the custom value to read for the button inside the component.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

events.name: toggle
events.description: Callback to invoke when a tab toggle.

slots.name: header
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Current id state as a string */ id: string; /** * Style class of the icon */ class: string; /** * Collapsed state as a boolean */ collapsed: boolean; }): VNode[]

slots.name: togglebutton
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Collapsed state as a boolean */ collapsed: boolean; /** * Toggle function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ toggleCallback: (event: Event) => void; /** * Keydown function. * @param {Event} event - Browser event */ keydownCallback: (event: Event) => void; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom toggle button template of panel.

slots.name: togglericon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Collapsed state as a boolean */ collapsed: boolean; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom toggler icon template of panel.

slots.name: toggleicon
slots.type: (scope: { /** * Collapsed state as a boolean */ collapsed: boolean; }): VNode[]
slots.description: Custom toggle icon template of panel.
